commits.message: Remove deprecated `// +build` directive from most files
commits.author: Vincent Demeester

release_note.text: Remove deprecated Go build directive syntax from source files.

commits.message: test: implement parallel/serial test categorization system
commits.author: Vincent Demeester

release_note.text: Add parallel and serial test categorization system for e2e test execution.

commits.message: refactor: add clock injection to cache for testing
commits.author: Stanislav Jakuschevskij

release_note.text: Add clock injection to resolver cache for improved test isolation.

commits.message: fix: Align cache configstore with framework implementation
commits.author: Seunghun Shin

release_note.text: Fix resolver cache race condition causing duplicate upstream pulls under concurrent load.

commits.message: fix: resolve cache race with singleflight
commits.author: Stanislav Jakuschevskij

release_note.text: Deduplicate concurrent resolver cache requests with singleflight to prevent cache stampede and reduce upstream API calls (e.g., GitLab 429 throttling).

commits.message: fix: remove corrupted cache entries on type error
commits.author: Stanislav Jakuschevskij

release_note.text: Remove corrupted cache entries on type assertion errors to prevent stale data from blocking subsequent resolution attempts.

commits.message: fix: use TextParser struct directly for prometheus/common v0.62.0 compatibility
commits.author: Vibhav Bobade

release_note.text: Fix compatibility with prometheus/common v0.62.0 by using TextParser struct directly.

commits.message: fix: convert pod latency metric to histogram and remove pod label
commits.author: Vibhav Bobade

release_note.text: The tekton_pipelines_controller_taskruns_pod_latency_milliseconds metric has been converted from a Gauge to a Histogram and the pod label has been removed. Dashboards or alerts referencing this metric will need to be updated to use histogram_quantile() instead of direct value queries.

commits.message: [Release-v0.7.0] Fix CVE-2026-33211: bump tektoncd/pipeline to v1.0.2
commits.author: infernus01

release_note.text: Fixes CVE-2026-33186 (High severity) by updating google.golang.org/grpc to v1.79.3, resolving an authorization bypass vulnerability where a missing leading slash in the :path header could allow attackers to bypass gRPC server authorization checks.

Fixes CVE-2026-39821 and CVE-2026-33814 by upgrading golang.org/x/net to v0.55.0 and Go to 1.25.11. This resolves an ASCII-only Punycode label rejection bypass in x/net/idna and an HTTP/2 infinite loop caused by bad SETTINGS_MAX_FRAME_SIZE values.

Internal Konflux build configuration cleanup.
Internal pipeline dependency upgrade as part of CVE remediation.
Internal lint issue fixes.
